qa_pair.question: Open example.com and report the page title via browser_status or browser_evaluate.
On https://example.com, what is the text of the first <h1> (use browser_find with css="h1" then browser_element_state with include="text_attrs")?
On https://example.com, how many <a> elements exist (browser_find_all with css="a")?
On https://example.com, what is the value of document.documentElement.lang (use browser_evaluate)?
On https://example.com, what is the lowercased tagName of the first <h1> element (use browser_evaluate with expression "document.querySelector('h1').tagName.toLowerCase()")?
Take a PNG screenshot of https://example.com via browser_screenshot. Is the returned base64 image data non-empty (boolean)?
On https://example.com after browser_storage_set with kind="local", key="zd_test", value="42", what does browser_storage_get with kind="local", key="zd_test" return for the value?
Navigate to https://example.com then https://www.iana.org/help/example-domains, then call browser_back. What host is current (use the host portion of browser_status.current_tab.url)?
On https://httpbin.org/cookies/set/foo/bar, after navigation completes, what cookie name does browser_cookies_get with url="https://httpbin.org/" return (first entry's name)?
Call browser_evaluate with expression "1 + 2" against https://example.com. What numeric value is returned?
